query:
-- Latest prices for Concentrate 16% (4), Alfalfa Hay (2), Hay (7)
SELECT feedItemId, pricePerUnit, effectiveDate
FROM feed_item_price_history
WHERE feedItemId IN (4, 2, 7)
  AND effectiveDate = (SELECT MAX(effectiveDate) FROM feed_item_price_history fip2 WHERE fip2.feedItemId = feed_item_price_history.feedItemId);
